svg.title: SentinelIQ Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end architecture of the SentinelIQ threat intelligence platform, showing data sources, ingestion layer, RAG pipeline, backend, and frontend dashboard.

g.text: JSON, PDF, RSS, REST API loaders
Pinecone or Redis VSS — semantic search
Query → retrieve top-k docs → prompt with context → plain-language answer + source citations
JWT, API keys, Redis rate limiter
React dashboard — plain-language alerts, CVE cards, threat timeline, analyst chat interface
